data.body:
- replace Beads with a markdown link to https://github.com/steveyegge/beads?tab=readme-ov-file
- in the quickstart, add that `kno init` is also how you share a repo that is already using Knots.  describe how instead of creating the remote tracking branch, it will simply sync you with the latest Knots.  So if a repo owner/readme says it uses Knots, `kno init` is how you onboard.
data.title: Update README.md with some small changes
